recommendations.title: Art of the Devil
recommendations.overview: When Boom suffers abandonment and abuse by Prathan, she decides to use black magic to take revenge on him and his family.

recommendations.title: The Gospel of John
recommendations.overview: A word for word depiction of the life of Jesus Christ from the Good News Translation Bible as recorded in the Gospel of John.

recommendations.title: English Vinglish
recommendations.overview: In the United States for the first time, an Indian housewife with a limited command of English turns Manhattan into her personal language school.

recommendations.title: Bear Story
recommendations.overview: An old bear goes out every day to a busy street corner. Through a tin marionette theater of his own making, the bear will tell us his life story.

recommendations.title: Flawless
recommendations.overview: An ultraconservative police officer suffers a debilitating stroke and is assigned to a rehabilitative program that includes singing lessons - with the drag queen next door.

recommendations.title: Always Shine
recommendations.overview: On a trip to Big Sur, two friends, both actresses, try to reconnect with one another. Once alone, the women's suppressed jealousies and deep-seated resentments begin to rise, causing them to lose their grasp on not only the true nature of their relat

recommendations.title: A Simple Life
recommendations.overview: After suffering a stroke, an altruistic maid announces that she wants to quit her job and move into an old people's home.

recommendations.title: Place publique
recommendations.overview: Revolves around Castro, who was once a very famous TV host, but as he grows old, his popularity is dwindling.

recommendations.title: Ilo Ilo
recommendations.overview: During the late 1990s, a busy working-class Singaporean couple hires a Filipino woman as a maid and nanny to their young son.

recommendations.title: The Edukators
recommendations.overview: Three activists cobble together a kidnapping plot after they encounter a businessman in his home.
